headline: Barclays Lowers Price Target on The Southern Company (SO)
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.20%, The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is included among the 12 Best S&P 500 Stocks to Buy for Dividends. The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is one of the largest producers of electricity in the United States and the largest wholesale provider in the Southeast. headline: American Electric Power Stock's Independent Current

headline: 64 Years Old With $1.1 Million in a Traditional IRA. Here’s Where I’m Allocating Capital
summary: At 64, with $1.1 million in a Traditional IRA, tax-deferred cash flow is the point. With the 10-year Treasury at 4.50% and the 30-year at 4.94%, dividend yields have to earn their seat. The 10-year has swung between 4.43% and 4.56% in June alone, and that yield volatility is exactly what forced me to re-stack ... 64 Years Old With $1.1 Million in a Traditional IRA. Here’s Where I’m Allocating Capital

headline: Can NextEra Energy's Strategic Investments Fuel Long-Term Growth?
summary: NEE's $94.1 billion-plus capital plan through 2030 aims to expand FPL, renewables and storage while supporting long-term growth.

headline: What Southern (SO)'s Anticipated Earnings Uptick and Premium Valuation Mean For Shareholders
summary: Earlier this week, Southern Co. reported that analysts expect higher earnings per share of US$1.01 and revenue growth in its upcoming quarterly release, while earnings estimates have remained steady and the stock trades at a premium to the US electric utilities industry. This combination of anticipated profit and sales improvement, stable forecasts, and relatively rich valuation highlights investor confidence in Southern’s near-term business outlook. Next, we’ll explore how expectations for...
